content_body: Wrapsody in Blue has been decorating North Georgia since 2005. The iconic store offers a variety of high-quality furnishings and decor to beautify your life - affordably. Their uniquely curated pieces add a touch of lakeside, mountaintop whimsy to any home. Locals and seasonal vacationers of all ages enjoy their expert design services and friendly, personalized service.
title: Wrapsody in Blue
